heading: Effect of chapter on other laws
label: 2244 Effect of chapter on other laws

children.heading: Conformity with State and Federal law
children.label: a Conformity with State and Federal law
children.text: All actions taken pursuant to this chapter pertaining to the diversion, storage, use, or transfer of water shall be in conformity with applicable State and applicable Federal law.

children.heading: Effect on jurisdiction, authority, and water rights
children.label: b Effect on jurisdiction, authority, and water rights
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as expanding or diminishing State, Federal, or tribal jurisdiction or authority over water resources development, control, or water rights.
